---
title: "Arthur Berg, Ph.D."
subtitle: "Professor of Biostatistics · Penn State College of Medicine"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: photo.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:berg@psu.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/arthurberg
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arthurberg
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4097-7348
    - text: Penn State Pure
      href: https://pennstate.pure.elsevier.com/en/persons/arthur-berg
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=asQf9VQAAAAJ
---

## About

I am a tenured **Professor of Biostatistics** in the Department of Public
Health Sciences at the Penn State College of Medicine, with joint appointments
in the Departments of Surgery, Neurosurgery, Family and Community Medicine,
and Statistics. I directed Penn State's Biostatistics PhD Program from 2011 to 2024, and
currently serve as Lead Biostatistician for Pediatric Oncology Clinical
Trials at Penn State.

My research spans methodological biostatistics and applied collaborations
across oncology, neuroscience, spinal cord injury, environmental
physiology, and more. Recent methodological interests include Bayesian
clinical trial design, statistical genetics, and interdisciplinary
applications of data science — including an entropy-based approach to
Chinese character learning.

I also serve as an independent biostatistician on clinical trial
data monitoring committees and provide biostatistical expert-witness
services.

## Highlights

::: {.highlight-grid}
::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-file-lines"></i> 273 Publications
See [Publications](publications.qmd)
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-user-doctor"></i> Lead Biostatistician
Pediatric Oncology Clinical Trials, Penn State (2024–present)
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> Director (2011–2024)
Penn State Biostatistics PhD Program
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i> Editor
*Statistics Innovation* — Editorial Board (2024–present)
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-school"></i> Education
**Ph.D.** & **M.S.** — UC San Diego

**M.A.** & **B.S.** — University of Southern California
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i> Joint Appointments
Professor — Departments of **Surgery**, **Neurosurgery**, **Family & Community Medicine**, and **Statistics**
:::

::: {.highlight-card .highlight-card-wide}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-users"></i> Memberships
- Penn State Cancer Institute
- Cancer Institute, Cancer Control Program
- Huck Institutes of the Life Sciences
- Bioinformatics and Genomics PhD Program Faculty
- Biomedical Sciences PhD Program Faculty
:::
:::

See the full [CV](cv.qmd) for details, or get in [touch](contact.qmd).
